item.name: Turali Land Crab
item.description:
These brilliant blue crabs make for a filling feast when cooked.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: This crab's carapace is almost indistinguishable from the deep blue waters of the caldera lakes it calls home, lending it an advantage when hunting prey and avoiding predators. Turning bright red when boiled, its shell is soft, tender, and very much edible.
